items.title: FDA shares guide on genome editing best practices
items.summary: The FDA's guidance emphasises the potential of NGS methods to mitigate safety risks associated with therapies incorporating genome editing.

items.title: Amazon launches AI drug discovery platform
items.summary: Amazon has already collaborated with Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center with its AI drug discovery software.

items.title: J&J sets the tone for Q1 earnings with strong oncology growth
items.summary: Off the back of J&J's positive Q1, CEO Joaquin Duato forecasts strong growth acceleration for 2026, driven partially by psoriasis med Icotyde

items.title: Adcendo secures $75m in Series C funding for ADC development
items.summary: Adcendo, a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing ADCs for cancer treatment, has raised $75m in a Series C funding round.

items.title: Lilly to acquire CrossBridge Bio for up to $300m
items.summary: Eli Lilly and Company has agreed to acquire all outstanding shares of CrossBridge Bio for up to $300m in cash.
